outLeadCompany.title: outLeadCompany
outLeadCompany.description: The name of the company associated with the retrieved lead.

outLeadIndustry.title: outLeadIndustry
outLeadIndustry.description: The industry or vertical market the lead's company operates in.

outLeadName.title: outLeadName
outLeadName.description: The full name of the lead.

outLeadScore.title: outLeadScore
outLeadScore.description: The numerical score assigned to the lead indicating conversion probability.

outLeadTier.title: outLeadTier
outLeadTier.description: The classification tier (e.g., Enterprise, Mid-Market, SMB) of the lead.
